control.description-key: Builds and downloads an Excel/CSV file from data fed by the canvas app (supports chunked feeding for large volumes).

property.name: fileName
property.description-key: Base file name without extension, set from the canvas app (e.g. "Payment Transactions"). Default: Export.

property.name: sheetName
property.description-key: Name of the worksheet/tab in the Excel file, set from the canvas app. Default: Data.

property.name: csvDelimiter
property.description-key: Single character separating CSV columns. Default: comma. Use a semicolon (;) for Greek/European Excel.

property.name: inputData
property.description-key: JSON array of row objects, or an OData {value:[...]} object.

property.name: columnsConfig
property.description-key: Optional JSON array of {key,header,type,format} to control which columns, their order, headers and Excel cell type. type = text (default) | number | date; format = optional Excel number/date format (e.g. #,##0.00 or dd/mm/yyyy). If empty, columns are inferred from the data.

property.name: appendMode
property.description-key: When ON, each fed chunk is appended to the buffer (for large/paged exports). When OFF, inputData is treated as the full dataset on export.

property.name: dataVersion
property.description-key: Increment this each time a new chunk is supplied in inputData (append mode) so the control ingests it.

property.name: triggerExport
property.description-key: Increment this value to build and download the file.

property.name: resetBuffer
property.description-key: Increment this value to clear the in-memory buffer (call before feeding a new paged export).

property.name: showButtons
property.description-key: Show the built-in Excel/CSV buttons. Default: shown. Turn OFF in production if you trigger from your own button.

property.name: downloadLabel
property.description-key: Text for the Download button shown after a host-app trigger. If empty, shows Download followed by the file name.

property.name: downloadColor
property.description-key: Background color of the Download button (any CSS color, e.g. #595959 or RGBA). Default: blue.

property.name: downloadTextColor
property.description-key: Text color of the Download button (any CSS color). Default: white.

property.name: rowCount
property.description-key: Number of rows currently in the buffer.
